name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.neural_networks.EstimatorQNN
summary: A quantum neural network that computes expectation values of observables as outputs and supports gradient backpropagation for variational training.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.neural_networks.SamplerQNN
summary: A quantum neural network that maps circuit measurement probability distributions to output values via an interpret function.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.neural_networks.NeuralNetwork
summary: Abstract base class for all quantum neural networks defining the forward and backward interface.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.neural_networks.EffectiveDimension
summary: Computes the global effective dimension of a quantum neural network as an information-geometric measure of model expressiveness.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.neural_networks.LocalEffectiveDimension
summary: Computes the local effective dimension of a quantum neural network around specific parameter values to measure model capacity.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.algorithms.classifiers.NeuralNetworkClassifier
summary: A scikit-learn-compatible quantum classifier that wraps any NeuralNetwork and trains it via a loss function for binary or multi-class classification.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.algorithms.classifiers.VQC
summary: Variational Quantum Classifier combining a feature map for data encoding and a parameterized ansatz circuit optimized to perform supervised classification.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.algorithms.classifiers.QSVC
summary: Quantum Support Vector Classifier using the quantum kernel computed from fidelity between feature-map-encoded states as the SVM kernel function.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.algorithms.classifiers.PegasosQSVC
summary: Quantum Support Vector Classifier based on the Pegasos stochastic gradient algorithm using a quantum kernel function for improved SVM training scalability.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.algorithms.regressors.NeuralNetworkRegressor
summary: A scikit-learn-compatible quantum regressor that wraps any NeuralNetwork and trains it to predict continuous-valued outputs.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.algorithms.regressors.VQR
summary: Variational Quantum Regressor using a feature map and trainable ansatz circuit to fit continuous-valued target functions.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.algorithms.regressors.QSVR
summary: Quantum Support Vector Regressor that uses a quantum kernel function in a classical SVR framework for regression tasks.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.kernels.FidelityQuantumKernel
summary: Quantum kernel computing the inner product between quantum states prepared by a feature map using the compute-uncompute (Hadamard test) fidelity method.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.kernels.FidelityStatevectorKernel
summary: Statevector-based quantum kernel computing exact fidelities between feature-map-encoded states for kernel machine learning.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.kernels.TrainableFidelityQuantumKernel
summary: A trainable quantum kernel whose feature map parameters are optimized to align the kernel with training labels combining kernel methods with variational training.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.kernels.TrainableFidelityStatevectorKernel
summary: Statevector-based trainable quantum kernel combining exact fidelity computation with variational optimization of feature map parameters.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.kernels.algorithms.QuantumKernelTrainer
summary: Trains a quantum kernel by optimizing its free parameters to maximize kernel-target alignment using a variational optimizer.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.circuit.library.qnn_circuit
summary: Constructs a QNN circuit by composing a data-encoding feature map and a trainable ansatz and returns the input and weight parameters separately.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.circuit.library.RawFeatureVector
summary: Parameterized circuit that directly encodes a feature vector into the amplitude vector of a quantum state implementing amplitude encoding.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.circuit.library.raw_feature_vector
summary: Creates a parameterized amplitude encoding circuit that maps a classical feature vector into quantum amplitudes.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.connectors.TorchConnector
summary: Bridges a Qiskit NeuralNetwork to PyTorch by wrapping it as a torch.nn.Module enabling hybrid quantum-classical training with PyTorch optimizers and autograd.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.gradients.ParamShiftEstimatorGradient
summary: Computes gradients of expectation values with respect to circuit parameters using the parameter-shift rule for gradient-based variational optimization.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.gradients.ParamShiftSamplerGradient
summary: Computes gradients of probability distributions with respect to circuit parameters using the parameter-shift rule.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.gradients.LinCombEstimatorGradient
summary: Computes expectation value gradients using the linear combination of unitaries method as an alternative to the parameter-shift rule.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.gradients.LinCombSamplerGradient
summary: Computes probability distribution gradients using the linear combination of unitaries method.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.gradients.SPSAEstimatorGradient
summary: Estimates expectation value gradients using SPSA a noise-robust stochastic approximation alternative to parameter-shift for noisy hardware.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.gradients.SPSASamplerGradient
summary: Estimates probability distribution gradients using SPSA for noise-robust variational optimization.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.gradients.QFI
summary: Computes the Quantum Fisher Information matrix of a parameterized circuit used to characterize trainability and compute natural gradients of variational algorithms.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.gradients.LinCombQGT
summary: Computes the Quantum Geometric Tensor using the linear combination of unitaries method providing curvature information for Riemannian optimization.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.algorithms.inference.QBayesian
summary: Quantum Bayesian inference algorithm encoding a Bayesian network as a quantum circuit and using rejection sampling to compute posterior probabilities.

name: /qiskit_machine_learning/qiskit_machine_learning.state_fidelities.ComputeUncompute
summary: Computes the fidelity between two quantum states using the compute-uncompute (Hadamard test) method by preparing one state and applying the inverse of the other.
